verdict.note: Real Chromium vs contract stub (/projects catalog gated admin-login; /p/:id/api proxied to two REAL spex serve backends). Admin card at root → catalog: 3 rows w/ live health dots (running/stopped), lock glyph on pw project; out-of-page /rig/add row appeared <8s via poll (live appearance); add-form: 4 harness product marks, explicit choice, register round-trip; doctor ran real spex doctor, report verbatim in drawer; Open → /p/spex/#/graph full classic dashboard through scoped api lane w/ chip + Projects entry; chip menu switch → /p/demo same-tab. Also themed (Rosé Pine Dawn --paper #faf4ed verified) + phone viewport no h-overflow. Console clean (only expected 401s pre-login).

Real Chromium, fresh context, direct /p/demo/#/graph (pw-protected, real spex backend behind stub gateway). Unified credential card (project face, same card as admin) — never a spinner; wrong pw → inline error; right pw → board rendered in place, no reload. Catalog isolation verified: no Projects rail entry, chip click opens NO menu (probe denied). Separate context: admin login at root then same URL → board with NO prompt (admin scope bypasses project gate, server-side cookie). Console clean modulo expected pre-login 401s.

REAL landed gateway this time: startHubGateway + gateway-auth on :8953, two real spex serve backends self-registered via backend.json (fresh SPEXCODE_HOME), thin static-SPA wrapper as the one allowed stand-in. Loopback bootstrap: catalog rendered with the ungated hint; set admin password through the header UI — page stayed signed in (hub rotated the cookie), hint dropped as adminGated flipped; gated the demo project from its row (PUT), lock badge landed on the poll; killed the demo backend out-of-page → row went unreachable/vanished live, restart re-registered and flipped back running, no reload; Open → /p/-home-jeffry-spexcode/#/graph full dashboard through the real proxied lane with chip + Projects entry; chip menu switched into the GATED demo (admin scope authorized). Console clean modulo expected 401 noise.

REAL landed gateway: fresh cookie-less context on the gated project's direct URL /p/-tmp-mp-rig-demo-notes/#/graph. The scoped api answered the hub's real 401 → unified credential card (project face, same card as admin), never a spinner; wrong pw → hub 401 → inline error; right pw → hub minted the real project-scope cookie (302) and the board rendered in place, no manual reload. Catalog isolation held: no Projects rail entry, chip menu never opened (the /projects probe was denied — admin-gated). Separate fresh context: the root showed the SAME card in admin face, sign-in listed the catalog, then the gated project URL opened with NO prompt (admin scope authorizes /p/*). Console clean modulo expected 401 noise.

A (reproduce): the whole graphical workflow (add→init with explicit harness→doctor→start) passes, but the final Open link lands on the backend's raw API index — the hub proxies ALL /p/:id/* including browser navigation, so the scoped SPA shell never serves and the board never renders (drive.cjs waitForSelector svg timeout).

note: re-filing against the commit that carries the measured UI

verdict.note: A (reproduce, pre-fix hub): with this UI the whole graphical workflow passes — add (non-repo refused verbatim), init gated on the explicit harness choice then exit-0 transcript, doctor report, Start flips the row online without reload — but the final Open lands on the backend's raw API index: the hub proxies ALL /p/:id/* including browser navigation, so the scoped SPA shell never serves and the board never renders (waitForSelector svg timeout 30s).

B (fix verified): full graphical lifecycle through the REAL startHostDashboard against throwaway repos — add by root (non-repo refusal verbatim), init refused until an explicit harness chip is picked then exit-0 transcript in place, doctor report, Start flips the row online without reload, and Open now lands on the scoped /p/<id>/#/graph board (hub serves the SPA shell on text/html navigation). Re-verified at 375px and in tokyonight on desktop + 375px. Video = the desktop workflow end to end; images = scoped board, mobile, second theme.

Re-measured on the REAL startHostDashboard (stand-in retired): two real spex serve backends registered through the page (repo-b inited via the setup drawer first), probed green dots; bootstrap hint until the admin password is SET through the header control — the very next poll still answers (cookie rotated, no logout); project password set/clear round-trips with the lock badge following; a backend killed OUTSIDE the page flips to the calm 'stopped' + Start via the poll, no reload; Open lands the admin on the gated project's scoped board with no prompt.

Re-measured on the REAL startHostDashboard: a cookie-less guest at the gated project's direct URL gets the unified credential card (project face — the scoped shell now serves pre-auth and the api 401 drives the card), wrong password shows the inline error, the right one renders the board in place with zero catalog leak (no switcher chip, no Projects entry); the admin signs in through the SAME card at the root and opens the gated project URL with no prompt.

Real Chromium through isolated startHostDashboard with two real spex serve backends: /projects showed the loopback bootstrap and two live rows (one initially gated); setting the admin password retained access, project password set/clear updated the lock, Open reached the scoped board with only five project-owned rail buttons, the chip returned to /projects, and stopping the second backend out of page produced a calm stopped row without reload. Two transient EventSource MIME diagnostics appeared during the cross-page run but did not affect the declared workflow.

Real Chromium through isolated startHostDashboard: registered a throwaway repo, gear loaded absent config as {}, invalid top-level JSON disabled save, valid spexcode.json saved to disk, a concurrent disk edit produced a visible 409 and survived reload; desktop and 375px editor stayed contained. Separate terminal action kept init/doctor: init required an explicit Codex chip, both real verbs exited 0, Start reconciled the real backend, and Open rendered the scoped graph.

Real Chromium through the same isolated startHostDashboard: set the admin password from loopback and retained access, set/cleared the project password with the lock badge following, opened the scoped board, killed the target supervisor by its validated catalog pid outside the page and watched the row become stopped, restarted it through Start, then gated it again.

Real Chromium against the gated restarted project: a fresh guest direct URL rendered the shared project credential card, wrong password stayed denied, correct password opened the graph with no catalog link. After clearing cookies, the same card's admin face accepted the administrator password and the admin opened the gated project URL without another prompt.
Real browser: failed init stayed visible; second folder reset choices, initialized Git+SpexCode, saved config, ran init/doctor, started backend, opened scoped graph; 375px had no overflow.
Real browser: offline catalog row, out-of-page backend start observed by refresh, admin password retained session, project gate set/cleared/restored, admin opened gated scoped graph.
Direct guest saw only anonymous project gate, wrong password failed inline, right password opened graph; after clearing cookies, admin login alone bypassed the project prompt.
